Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Team South Africa ATHLETICS entry list for Paris Olympics 2024

The entry lists for the Paris Olympics 2024 have been published, featuring the names of athletes who intend to compete in the French capital.

Theentry listsfor theParis Olympics  2024have been published, featuring the names of athletes who intend to compete in the French capital when athletics takes place between 1-11 August.

Bet Anytime, Anywhere Quick and Easy with Betway

Athletes from some200teams will compete across the programme of 48 events, which includes 23 women’s disciplines and 23 men’s disciplines as well as two mixed events – the 4x400m mixed relay and the marathon race walk mixed relay.

Among the entries are36of the Tokyo Olympic champions in individual events, who will defend their titles at the Stade de France and on the roads of Paris.

They include all bar one of the individual defending champions in the men’s events and15in the women’s events.

Faith Kipyegon (1 500m), Sydney McLaughlin-Levrone (400m hurdles), Karsten Warholm (400m hurdles), Mondo Duplantis (pole vault), Ryan Crouser (shot put) and Anita Wlodarczyk (hammer) are among the world record-holders who will return, targeting back-to-back Olympic title triumphs.

Dutch runner Sifan Hassan has been entered in four events. As well as potentially defending her 5 000m and 10 000m titles, she could also line up for the 1 500m and the marathon.

The youngest athlete entered isKenaz Kaniweteof Kiribati, who will be 16 years, 4 months and 6 days when he lines up for the first round of the 100m.

Australia’sSinead Diveris the oldest athlete entered. She will be 47 years, 4 months and 24 days on the day of the marathon.

Below, the South African men and women as per the official entry list.

NOTE:The entry list differs significantly from thelist of namespublished bySports Confederation, Olympic and Paralympic Committee (Sascoc)in recent weeks, but iscorrectat the time of publishing.

100m

Shaun Maswangani, Benjamin Richardson, Akani Simbine

200m

Shaun Maswangani, Benjamin Richardson, Wayde van Niekerk

400m

Zakithi Nene, Lythe Pillay

800m

Edmund du Plessis

1 500m

Ryan Mphahlele, Tshepo Tshite

10 000m

Adriaan Wildschutt

Marathon

Elroy Galant, Stephen Mokoka

High jump

Brian Raats

Long jump

Cheswill Johnson, Jovan van Vuuren

Shot put

Kyle Blignaut

Discus

Victor Hogan, Francois Prinsloo

4x100m relay

Sinesipho Dambile, Shaun Maswnganyi, Brdley Nkoana, Benjamin Richardson, Akani Simbine, Bayanda Walaza

4x400m relay

Gardeo Isaacs, Zakithi Nene, Antoine Nortje, Lythe Pillay, Adrian Swart

400m

Miranda Coetzee

800m

Prudence Sekgodiso

Marathon

Cian Oldknow, Gerda Steyn, Irvette van Zyl

100m Hurdles

Marione Fourie

400m Hurdles

Zeney Geldenhuys, Rogail Joseph

Shot put

Minéde Klerk, Ashley Erasmus

Javelin

Jo-Ane van Dyk
